name: Zhejiang Cangnan Instrument Group Company Limited
summary: Zhejiang Cangnan Instrument Group Company Limited manufactures and sells gas metering instruments and other related products in People's Republic of China. The company offers gas flowmeters and filters, pressure regulating devices, volume correctors, and flowrate controllers; gas meters, remote wireless diaphragm gas meters, and IC card remote wireless smart controllers; and throttle devices, as well as after sale services. Its products are used in urban gas industry and petroleum systems. The company also exports its products to the United States, Europe, South America, Southeast Asia, and other countries and regions. Zhejiang Cangnan Instrument Group Company Limited was founded in 1977 and is headquartered in Wenzhou, China.
